debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
inst✝⁷ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝⁶ : OrderBot ι
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
X : ι → Ω → E
inst✝⁵ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝⁴ : OrderTopology ι
inst✝³ : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝² : 𝓕.HasUsualConditions P
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
hX :
  @ProbabilityTheory.Locally ι Ω E mΩ inst✝⁷ inst✝⁶ inst✝⁵ inst✝⁴
    SubtractionMonoid.toSubNegZeroMonoid.toNegZeroClass.toZero
    (fun X => ∀ (ω : Ω) (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)) 𝓕 X P
⊢ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, ∀ (x : ι), ∃ l, Tendsto (fun x => X x ω) (nhdsWithin x (Set.Iio x)) (nhds l)

failed_attempts:
filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω x
  specialize hn n le_rfl

  filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with y hy

  · exact bot_le.trans_lt (hy.trans hn)

rcases hX with ⟨τ, hτ, hX⟩
  filter_upwards [hτ.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
  by_cases hx : x = ⊥
  · rw [hx]; exact ⟨0, tendsto_bot⟩
  · obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ : ∃ n, x < τ n ω := by
      rw [tendsto_atTop_nhds] at hω
      exact (hω {y | x < y} (isOpen_Ioi _) (by simp)).exists
    specialize hX n ω x
    obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hX
    refine ⟨l, hl.congr' ?_⟩
    have : ⊥ < τ n ω := bot_le.trans_lt hn
    filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with y hy
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le _ (hy.trans hn).le, Set.indicator_of_mem this]

end NormedSpace

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω x
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hω
  by_cases hx : (Set.Iio x).Nonempty
  · obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := hω x le_rfl
    specialize hn n le_rfl
    have h_ind : ⊥ < hX.localSeq n ω :=
      lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le (lt_trans (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.2 hx.choose_spec) hn)

    filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with t ht
    rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le, Set.indicator_of_mem h_ind]
    exact (ht.trans hn).le
  · refine ⟨0, ?_⟩
    simp only [Set.not_nonempty_iff_eq_empty] at hx
    rw [hx, nhdsWithin_empty]
    exact tendsto_bot

  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ : ∃ n, ↑x < hX.localSeq n ω := hω x

  · simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hω x

  have : ∀ t < x, X t ω =

  exact hX.stoppedProcess n ω x

have h_seq := hX.IsLocalizingSequence
  filter_upwards [h_seq.tendsto_top] with ω h_top x

  · rw [hx]
    simp only [Set.Iio_bot, nhdsWithin_empty, tendsto_bot, exists_const]

    rw [WithTop.coe_le_coe, le_bot_iff] at this
    exact (hx this).elim

end NormedSpace

filter_upwards [hX.IsLocalizingSequence.tendsto_top] with ω hτ x
  rw [WithTop.tendsto_atTop_nhds_top_iff] at hτ
  obtain ⟨n, hn⟩ := (hτ x).exists
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hX.stoppedProcess n ω x
  refine ⟨l, hl.congr' ?_⟩
  filter_upwards [self_mem_nhdsWithin] with y hy
  simp only [Set.mem_Iio] at hy
  have h_lt : (y : WithTop ι) < hX.localSeq n ω := lt_trans (WithTop.coe_lt_coe.2 hy) hn
  rw [stoppedProcess_eq_of_le h_lt.le, Set.indicator_of_mem]
  exact lt_of_le_of_lt bot_le h_lt
